data.body: Found while writing test-merge-state-golden-path.sh. ms_is_merge_in_progress calls git rev-parse HEAD without --git-dir, so if a test calls it without first cd-ing into the temp repo, the ambient worktree HEAD is used. This means the MERGE_HEAD==HEAD guard comparison uses mismatched SHAs (temp HEAD vs worktree HEAD) and the guard never fires. Affects any test verifying the self-referencing MERGE_HEAD guard via ms_is_merge_in_progress directly. Fixed in golden-path tests (S5-C1, S5-C6, S5-C7) by using (cd "$repo" && ...) subshell. Check test-merge-state.sh test_merge_head_equals_head_guard_skips_filtering — it avoids the issue by calling ms_get_worktree_only_files (which does cd), but tests of ms_is_merge_in_progress directly are at risk.
